source.name: Swedish Migration Agency — Residence permit for studies (higher education)

requirements.label: Notification of admission (Antagning.se)
requirements.detail: Confirmed admission to a full-time programme at a Swedish higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Maintenance requirement (proof of funds)
requirements.detail: Show at least SEK 10,656 per month for the period of study (about SEK 127,872 per year), via your own funds, scholarships or grants.

requirements.label: Tuition fees paid (non-EU/EEA)
requirements.detail: Non-EU/EEA students pay tuition; the first instalment is usually required before the permit is granted.

requirements.label: Comprehensive health insurance
requirements.detail: Required for studies shorter than one year; longer stays are covered once you receive a Swedish personal number.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the full period of study.

requirements.label: English language proof
requirements.detail: IELTS/TOEFL as your programme requires for English-taught study.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer tuition or maintenance funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Swedish number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Swedish student housing is scarce — arrange it early.
